home.title: Welcome to ManVaig
home.subtitle: Pawn-shop marketplace — list items, receive offers.

login.title: ManVaig
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: ManVaig
register.termsCheckbox: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
register.errorDisplayNameFormat: Username can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores
register.errorEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.errorTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register.errorDuplicateEmail: An account with this email already exists
register.errorPasswordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit (0-9)
register.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
register.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emailConfirmation.title: Check your email
emailConfirmation.description: We sent you a confirmation link. Click it to verify your email and unlock all features.
emailConfirmation.descriptionWithEmail: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to verify your email and unlock all features.
emailConfirmation.resendError: Could not resend email. Please try again.
emailConfirmation.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
emailConfirmation.confirmedDescription: Your email has been verified. You now have full access to all features.
emailConfirmation.errorDescription: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
emailConfirmation.inlineDescription: Please confirm your email to access this feature.
emailConfirmation.rateLimited: Please wait before requesting another email.

emailManagement.changeSuccess: Email changed! Check your inbox for the verification link.
emailManagement.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
emailManagement.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
emailManagement.errorPasswordRequired: Password is required to change email
emailManagement.errorEmailTaken: This email is already in use
emailManagement.errorSameEmail: This is already your current email
emailManagement.errorRateLimited: Please wait before sending another email.
emailManagement.errorResendFailed: Could not send email. Please try again.
emailManagement.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.profilePrivateDescription: Only you can see your profile
profile.avatarUploadError: Could not upload avatar. Please try again.
profile.profilePrivateMessage: This profile is private or does not exist.
profile.errorSaveFailed: Could not save profile. Please try again.
profile.errorLoadFailed: Could not load profile. Please try again.

stalls.title: My Stalls
stalls.emptyDescription: Stalls help you organize your items into themed groups. Think of them as different sections of your marketplace stand.
stalls.name: Stall name
stalls.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete this stall and all {count} items in it. This cannot be undone.
stalls.errorLoadFailed: Could not load stalls. Please try again.
stalls.errorCreateFailed: Could not create stall. Please try again.
stalls.errorImageUpload: Could not upload image. Please try again.
stalls.thumbnailDeleteFailed: Could not remove photo. Please try again.
stalls.noAttentionItems: No items need your attention right now

items.title: My Items
items.emptyDescription: Start listing items to receive offers from buyers.
items.errorLoadFailed: Could not load items. Please try again.

itemForm.wizardStep1Desc: Choose a category and how you want to price your item.
itemForm.wizardStep2Desc: Add photos and details about your item.
itemForm.imagesHint: First image is the cover. Max 5 images, 5MB each. Drag to reorder, star to set cover.
itemForm.imagesHintSimple: First image is the cover. Max 5 images, 5MB each. Use arrows to reorder.
itemForm.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the item, its condition, history...
itemForm.locationHint: Pre-filled from your profile. Change if item is elsewhere.
itemForm.pricing_fixed_desc: Set your price, buyers pay it
itemForm.pricing_offers_desc: Set a price, accept lower offers
itemForm.offersHint: Buyers can offer less than this price
itemForm.biddingHint: Bidding starts from this price and goes up
itemForm.bidStepHint: Minimum increment for each new bid
itemForm.antiSniperNote: Anti-sniper protection: if a bid is placed in the last 10 minutes, the auction automatically extends by 10 minutes.
itemForm.visibilityHint: Controls who can see this item
itemForm.guestOffersHint: Users without an account can submit offers (name + contact required)
itemForm.canShipHint: Item can be shipped to the buyer
itemForm.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This cannot be undone.
itemForm.errorTitleLength: Title must be between 3 and 100 characters
itemForm.errorPriceRequired: Price is required and must be greater than 0
itemForm.errorPriceDecimals: Price can have at most 2 decimal places
itemForm.errorMinOfferExceedsPrice: Minimum offer price cannot exceed the listed price
itemForm.errorMinBidPositive: Minimum bid must be greater than 0
itemForm.errorBidStepPositive: Bid step must be greater than 0
itemForm.errorAuctionEndMinDuration: Auction must end at least 1 hour from now
itemForm.errorAuctionStartRequired: Starting price is required for auctions
itemForm.errorTagLength: Each tag must be 30 characters or less
itemForm.errorImageType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are supported
itemForm.errorSaveFailed: Could not save item. Please try again.
itemForm.errorDeleteFailed: Could not delete item. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_ITEM_LIMIT_REACHED: Item limit reached. You cannot add more items.
itemForm.apiError_TITLE_LENGTH: Title must be between 3 and 100 characters.
itemForm.apiError_TAG_LENGTH: Each tag must be 30 characters or less.
itemForm.apiError_PRICE_REQUIRED: Price is required and must be greater than 0.
itemForm.apiError_MIN_OFFER_EXCEEDS_PRICE: Minimum offer price cannot exceed the listed price.
itemForm.apiError_AUCTION_END_TOO_SOON: Auction must end at least 1 hour from now.
itemForm.apiError_BID_STEP_POSITIVE: Bid step must be greater than 0.
itemForm.apiError_AUCTION_LOCKED: This auction has bids and cannot be modified.
itemForm.apiError_AUCTION_GRACE_PERIOD: This auction has ended. It will remain locked for 48 hours.
itemForm.apiError_item_create_failed: Could not create item. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_item_update_failed: Could not update item. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_image_upload_failed: Could not upload images. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_image_reorder_failed: Could not reorder images. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_image_delete_failed: Could not delete image. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_IMAGE_INVALID_TYPE: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images are supported.
itemForm.apiError_assign_next_failed: Could not assign next winner. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_bids_fetch_failed: Could not load bids. Please try again.
itemForm.apiError_NOT_AUCTION: This item is not an auction.
itemForm.apiError_CANNOT_BID_OWN_ITEM: You cannot bid on your own item.
itemForm.apiError_BID_TOO_LOW: Your bid must be higher than the current highest bid.
itemForm.apiError_BID_BELOW_STARTING: Your bid must be at least the starting price.
itemForm.apiError_BID_STEP_TOO_SMALL: Your bid must respect the minimum bid step.
itemForm.apiError_AUCTION_NOT_ENDED: The auction has not ended yet.
itemForm.apiError_WINNER_NOT_EXPIRED: The winner's 24-hour confirmation period has not expired yet.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentDescription: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link. Click it to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.errorEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.errorDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
resetPassword.errorPasswordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit (0-9)
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

feed.noItemsInCategory: No items in this category yet
